+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-4245-extension-of-tester-runner-with-custom-builtins-and-u",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Extension of tester/Runner with custom builtins and unknowns",
+    "description": "Extension of tester/Runner with custom builtins and unknowns. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\nI need to execute tests written in Rego using the API of the library, in particular I have modules and test as strings and so I use the library in this way: \n\n```\nmainModule, _ := ast.ParseModuleWithOpts(policiesFilePath, PolicyFileContent,"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Extension of tester/Runner with custom builtins and unknowns",
+        "description": "See the detail description on: https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/issues/4245\n```yaml\nmainModule, _ := ast.ParseModuleWithOpts(policiesFilePath, PolicyFileContent, parserOptions)\nmodules[policiesFilePath] = mainModule\ntestsModule, _ := ast.ParseModuleWithOpts(testsFilePath, TestFileContent, parserOptions)\nmodules[testsFilePath] = testsModule\n\nrunner := tester.NewRunner().\n                SetModules(modules).\n                SetTimeout(timeout).\n                EnableTracing(true).\n                CapturePrintOutput(true)\n\nresultCh, _ := runner.RunTests(ctx, nil)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Extension of tester/Runner with custom builtins and unknowns\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the detail description on: https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/issues/4245",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "mainModule, _ := ast.ParseModuleWithOpts(policiesFilePath, PolicyFileContent, parserOptions)\nmodules[policiesFilePath] = mainModule\ntestsModule, _ := ast.ParseModuleWithOpts(testsFilePath, TestFileContent, parserOptions)\nmodules[testsFilePath] = testsModule\n\nrunner := tester.NewRunner().\n                SetModules(modules).\n                SetTimeout(timeout).\n                EnableTracing(true).\n                CapturePrintOutput(true)\n\nresultCh, _ := runner.RunTests(ctx, nil)",
+        "type BuiltinMap struct {\n\tDecl *ast.Builtin\n\tFunc func(*rego.Rego)\n}\n\ntype Runner struct {\n\tcompiler              *ast.Compiler\n\tstore                 storage.Store\n\tcover                 topdown.QueryTracer\n\ttrace                 bool\n\tenablePrintStatements bool\n\truntime               *ast.Term\n\tfailureLine           bool\n\ttimeout               time.Duration\n\tmodules               map[string]*ast.Module\n\tbundles               map[string]*bundle.Bundle\n\tfilter                string\n\ttarget                string // target type (wasm, rego, etc.)\n\tbuiltins              []func(r *rego.Rego) //  <--- ADDED\n\tunknowns              []string  //  <--- ADDED\n}\n\nfunc (r *Runner) SetBuiltins(builtinMap map[string]*BuiltinMap) *Runner {\n\tbuiltinDeclMap := make(map[string]*ast.Builtin)\n\tfor k, v := ran"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
